message:
feat(fcp-host): add supervisor module with restart policies, resource limits, and connection tracking

Fix 4 pre-existing failing batch.rs tests and add supervisor.rs module
for oip0 (Node Gateway/Orchestrator). Includes RestartPolicy with
exponential backoff, ShutdownCoordinator for graceful SIGTERM→SIGKILL
sequencing, HealthCheckScheduler, ResourceLimits enforcement types,
and ConnectionTracker with RAII guard for shutdown draining.

110 new supervisor tests, 1458 total fcp-host lib tests, all clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
